title: Not syncing with two way connection boards
excerpt:
Hi there, 
I made two project boards and a two-way connection, however the sync was not working even items were updated. I have checked the mapping and it was all correct. Do you encounter the same issue?

posts.author: summertang (Summer Tang)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

I made two project boards and a two-way connection, however the sync was not working even items were updated. I have checked the mapping and it was all correct. Do you encounter the same issue?

posts.author: sirah (Sirah E)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @summertang!

Sirah here from Mindflows! You can do some troubleshooting by deleting the column and creating another new connect boards column and make sure that the “Two-way connection” is checked.

I hope this helps!

posts.author: summertang (Summer Tang)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Sirah,

Thanks for getting back! I have done this multiple times and made sure the “Two-way connection” is checked but nothing was synced.

Thanks
Summer

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Summer,

Have a few questions:

  1. Has your account been recently downgraded?
  2. Have you submitted the issue to monday support so they can check your account?
